title: Rich Molten French Kanten Agar Blanquette
description: A salty, molten French dish featuring kanten-agar, perfect for post-workout, low-fat friendly, and formed into a blanquette.
instructions: In a large pot, combine the chicken broth, kanten agar, salt, pepper, garlic powder, and onion powder, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer for 10 minutes, or until the kanten agar is dissolved.
Remove the pot from the heat and stir in the low-fat cream until well combined.
Add the candy pieces to the pot and stir until they are fully melted and the mixture is smooth.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and refrigerate for at least 3 hours, or until set.
Once set, use a knife to loosen the edges of the blanquette from the dish.
Invert the blanquette onto a serving plate and slice into squares.
Serve the blanquette warm, garnished with additional candy pieces if desired.
